user.title: Sungrow SHx Inverter
user.description: Configure the Modbus TCP connection to your Sungrow SHx hybrid inverter.

data_description.host: Hostname or IP address of the inverter / logger module (WiNet-S, LAN, etc.).
data_description.slave: Modbus unit ID of the inverter (default 1).
data_description.sbr_slave: Modbus unit ID of the SBR battery. Use 0 if no battery is attached.
data_description.battery_max_power: Nameplate maximum charge/discharge power of the battery stack, in watts.
data_description.wait_ms: Delay between consecutive Modbus requests. Increase if you see timeouts.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure {device}
reconfigure.description: Update the Modbus connection details for this inverter.

data_description.host: Hostname or IP address of the inverter / logger module (WiNet-S, LAN, etc.).
data_description.slave: Modbus unit ID of the inverter (default 1).
data_description.sbr_slave: Modbus unit ID of the SBR battery. Use 0 if no battery is attached.
data_description.battery_max_power: Nameplate maximum charge/discharge power of the battery stack, in watts.
data_description.wait_ms: Delay between consecutive Modbus requests. Increase if you see timeouts.

error.invalid_slave: The inverter rejected the configured unit ID

abort.unique_id_mismatch: The inverter at this address has a different serial number than the one being reconfigured

init.title: Sungrow SHx polling intervals
init.description: Tune how frequently each group of registers is polled.

data_description.scan_interval_realtime: How often live power/current values are polled (seconds).
data_description.scan_interval_fast: How often near-live values (energy counters, state) are polled (seconds).
data_description.scan_interval_medium: How often slower-changing values (temperatures, daily totals) are polled (seconds).
data_description.scan_interval_slowest: How often near-static values (serial, firmware, nameplate) are polled (seconds).

legacy_yaml_present.title: Legacy Sungrow YAML package is still loaded
legacy_yaml_present.description: Your `modbus_sungrow.yaml` package is still loaded (detected modbus hub `{hub_name}`). This integration now replaces it — remove the package entries from `configuration.yaml` and your `sensor: !include` / `template: !include` blocks, then restart Home Assistant. See the migration guide for the full step-by-step.

imported_from_yaml.title: Sungrow SHx entry imported from YAML

confirm.title: Remove the YAML import block
confirm.description: Delete the `sungrow_shx:` block from `configuration.yaml`. The config entry for **{title}** is already saved and will continue to work without it. Press **Submit** to dismiss this notice.
